narrative: US-Iran tensions over the weekend may weigh on EUR/USD at the Tokyo open; EUR/USD closed Friday at 1.1723. USD/JPY, which closed Friday at 157.03, may extend gains on safe-haven USD bid. AUD/USD, which closed Friday at 0.7208, may be supported by commodity bid, while USD/CAD, which closed Friday at 1.3588, may be pressured by the same factor.
